body:
CEO approved. Branch gsta-36/ci-smoke-tests pushed with build fixes and version bump to 0.1.1. I do not have a GitHub token in this environment to create the PR automatically.

Suggested PR title: chore(release): build fixes + bump versions to 0.1.1

Suggested PR body summary:
- Add tsconfig.base.json with JSX/react compiler options
- Exclude tests/stories from packages/react-ui build
- Add type devDependencies for backend/react-ui
- Bump package versions to 0.1.1

Verification performed locally: all 4 packages build successfully.

Create the PR via GitHub UI: https://github.com/AI-LLM-World/AI-Tools-Library/compare/main...gsta-36/ci-smoke-tests
Or run locally with gh CLI: gh pr create --base main --head gsta-36/ci-smoke-tests --title "chore(release): build fixes + bump versions to 0.1.1" --body "See summary in issue comments."

If you want me to open the PR, provide a GITHUB_TOKEN or GH_TOKEN in the environment and I will create it now.
